bank_status: SEALED - 20 questions, 6 categories. K533 smoke tier.
target_test: Smoke-test replication — sub-$1 spend, ~5 min wallclock, laptop-friendly
tiers_note: Subset of 10 facts from canonical corpus (CS-01, CS-02, AM-01, EG-01, EG-02, MJ-01, MJ-02, RC-01, HP-01, HP-02). 2 questions per fact.
grading_rubric: R10 three-tier (HOT / HIT / MISS) — substring matching against hot_required_elements. HOT = all required elements present (case-insensitive substring). HIT = >= ceil(n/2) elements present, at least 1. MISS = fewer than half.
alignment_guarantee: Every question's hot_required_elements are verified exact substrings of corpus_smoke.md at K533 seal time. Theoretical HOT ceiling = 100% (20/20). Cold models should score 0-2 HOT. Any Cathedral condition scoring below 10 HOT (50%) indicates retrieval failure, not question-bank mismatch.

questions.question: How many active member-owners did the Verdania Cooperative Platform report as of Q3 2025?
questions.canonical_answer: 847,293 active member-owners as of Q3 2025.
questions.hallucination_risk: high — model may invent a plausible member count

rubric.correct: Contains '847,293' and 'Q3 2025'
rubric.partial: Contains the correct count or quarter but not both
rubric.incorrect: Does not contain the correct count

questions.question: What was the Verdania Cooperative Platform's active member count in Q2 2025?
questions.canonical_answer: 791,440 active members in Q2 2025.
questions.hallucination_risk: high — model may invent an adjacent-quarter figure

rubric.correct: Contains '791,440'
rubric.partial: Contains a figure close to but not exactly 791,440
rubric.incorrect: Does not contain the correct figure

questions.question: What total transaction volume did the Verdania Cooperative Platform report for fiscal year 2024?
questions.canonical_answer: $4.7 billion in fiscal year 2024.
questions.hallucination_risk: high — model may confuse with other volume figures

rubric.correct: Contains '4.7 billion' and 'fiscal year 2024'
rubric.partial: Contains one element but not both
rubric.incorrect: Does not contain correct volume

questions.question: What was the year-over-year growth rate of Verdania's digital-asset transaction category in fiscal year 2024?
questions.canonical_answer: 47% year-over-year growth in the digital-asset category.
questions.hallucination_risk: high — model may confuse with the 23% overall volume growth

rubric.correct: Contains '47%' in context of digital-asset growth
rubric.partial: Contains 47 without % or in wrong context
rubric.incorrect: Does not contain 47% or gives wrong figure

questions.question: What is the optimal dense-to-sparse weighting ratio in the Thornwick hybrid retrieval architecture?
questions.canonical_answer: Dense-to-sparse weighting ratio of 0.73:0.27.

rubric.correct: Contains '0.73:0.27'
rubric.partial: Contains 0.73 alone without the full ratio
rubric.incorrect: Does not contain the correct ratio

questions.question: What median retrieval accuracy improvement do platforms report after migrating from pure dense retrieval to the Thornwick hybrid system?
questions.ground_truth: A median retrieval accuracy improvement of 19%.
questions.canonical_answer: Median retrieval accuracy improvement of 19% on the Observatory's benchmark suite.
questions.hallucination_risk: high — model may guess a different improvement figure

rubric.correct: Contains '19%' in context of retrieval accuracy improvement
rubric.partial: Contains 19 without % or in wrong context
rubric.incorrect: Does not contain 19%

questions.question: What is the canonical patronage allocation split under the Cooperative Capital Framework?
questions.ground_truth: 70% allocated by transaction volume and 30% allocated equally per active member.
questions.canonical_answer: 70% allocated by transaction volume and 30% allocated equally per active member.

rubric.correct: Contains '70%' and '30%' in context of patronage allocation

rubric.incorrect: Does not contain the correct split

questions.question: Within how many business days must cooperative platforms process membership applications under the Reference Onboarding Framework?

rubric.correct: Contains '10 business days'
rubric.partial: Contains 10 days without 'business' qualifier
rubric.incorrect: Does not contain the correct timeframe

questions.canonical_answer: From June 2021 to August 2022 — the longest receivership in sector history.
